title: prunella laciniata var. integerrima
intro: Prunella laciniata var. integerrima, also known as self-heal, is a perennial herb of the mint family that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. It contains flavonoids, triterpenoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of self-heal include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial effects. Self-heal can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
